name: Jamie - Legacy
description:
🐑 ┆ Wolf-in-sheep's-clothing ┆ !Slight NSFW intro!

**”You sink your teeth into the people you depend on.”**

*Jamie Lee knew his place in the world; a shy, dependent, and weak prey. You're the only one who sees past his facade and knows his true nature.* ┆ TW: possibly manipulation, that's rlly it

Requested by anon ┆ Art by @Ripleycano on ig
